query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN beachesLocalRules IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN beachesLocalRules = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN beachesLocalRules IS NOT NULL AND beachesLocalRules != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_data
FROM island_guides
